title: How to capitalize the first letter of each word (proper case)
task: Convert text to Title Case, capitalizing the first letter of every word.

excel.note: UPPER() for ALL CAPS, LOWER() for all lowercase.

explanation: PROPER capitalizes the first letter of each word and lowercases the rest. 'john smith' becomes 'John Smith'. Note it also capitalizes after apostrophes and hyphens, so "o'brien" becomes "O'Brien".
